title: South Korea static WGS84 administrative overlays for vector satellite-inspired family map
intendedUse: Premium family gift navigation overlay; not a legal, cadastral, survey, routing, emergency, or address dataset.

officialSourceSnapshot.note: Real WGS84 province/municipality rings are normalized into the static vector-only satellite-inspired viewBox; decorative only, not legal-boundary coordinates.

features.sourceNote: Projected from KOSTAT 2013 simplified WGS84 GeoJSON via southkorea/southkorea-maps static snapshot.

usageConstraints: No live map tiles, live map APIs, backend services, auth, or runtime API keys

firstLevelRegionPolicy.projection: EPSG:4326 lon/lat rings normalized into the 0-100 vector viewBox; no runtime raster co-registration.
